popularTod.noToons: No toons of the day yet.

register.title: Sign up
register.usernameError: Username must be 3–30 characters: letters, numbers, _ or - only

spiders.whatAre: Certain actions on Toonator (such as downloading toons) require spooders. Spooders is the website's internal currency, which can be earned or purchased.
spiders.howToEarn: Spooders are given for toons drawn for the "theme of the day", for toons that are featured in top-10 popular, for participating in contests and other achievements in Toonator's development.
spiders.howToBuyIntro: Only <link>registered users</link> can buy spooders. To buy them you can use one of the following methods.
spiders.accruedNote: Spiders are accrued within 24 hours after payment, or in the case of Patreon, immediately after connecting your account.
spiders.contactNote: In case of encountering any issues you can contact us at
spiders.earnIntro: Spooders are given for active participation in the life of the Toonator.
spiders.earnItem1: A toon for the Topic of the Day.
spiders.earnItem2: A toon in the TOP-10 most popular for more than 24 hours a week — 10 spooders for every hour it remains in the top spot.
spiders.buyBody: If you don't want to earn spooders, but you really need them, or you just want to help the project, you can buy spooders on a special page.
spiders.perksNote: Users who have purchased 500 Spooders in the last 30 days will receive special perks: a nickname color change and one free medal per day.
spiders.spendBody: Currently, spooders can be used to download toons, attach sounds to your toons, earn a spot in a <goodplaceLink>Good Place</goodplaceLink>, and gift medals. Soon, you'll be able to use them to pay other users for commissioned work. We're also developing other exciting services where spooders will be useful.

spidersBuy.intro: On this page you can buy spooders.
spidersBuy.messageHint: In the donation message, please write: Toonator: {username}

toonPage.commentTooLong: Comment must be 250 characters or less.

home.tagline1: Toonator is online cartoon editing tool.
home.tagline2: With Toonator you can easily make funny animations.

sandbox.title: Sandbox - Toonator.com
sandbox.description: Browse animations from new Toonator users.

home.title: Toonator.com - Make animation online!
home.description: Toonator is online cartoon editing tool.
home.ogDescription: Toonator is online cartoon editing tool.

goodPlace.title: Good Place — Toonator
goodPlace.description: Feature your animation in the Good Place using spiders.

popularWeek.title: Most popular toons this week - Toonator.com

last.title: Last toons - Toonator.com
last.description: Browse the latest animations on Toonator.

goodPlace.title: Good Place
goodPlace.description: Good Place — special place on some pages of Toonator, which can be occupied by any user!
goodPlace.spoodersNeeded: All you need is some count of <link>spooders</link>.
goodPlace.occupiedDuration: Good Place can be occupied for 12 hours, but it may be overbought by another user, if he will make a bet higher. However your previous bid does not returned to you.
goodPlace.anyToon: You can choose any toon for the Good Place, your own as well as someone else. The place is bought anonymously (buyer is visible only for the Administrator).
goodPlace.illegalWarning: If the posted toon contains illegal scenes, the Good Place can be released by the Administrator. In this case, the spooders will not be returned, and place is occupied by previous buyer. User who placed such illegal toon can be penalized.
goodPlace.minimumBid: Minimum bid: {count, plural, one {# spooder} other {# spooders}}.
goodPlace.lastBid: Last bid: {count, plural, one {# spooder} other {# spooders}}.
goodPlace.onlyRegistered: Only registered user can put an animation at Good Place.
goodPlace.yourBalance: Your balance: {count, plural, one {# spider} other {# spiders}}

rankStatus.monarchNote: As a Monarch you can choose an alternative display name.
rankStatus.hideRank: Dont show rank on my page

promotion.title: Apply for rank promotion
promotion.info: Your current rank is {rank}. {desc} You can submit a promotion request, but no more than twice per month.
promotion.pending: ⏳ You have a request currently being reviewed. Results within 24 hours.
promotion.lastRequest: Last request: {date}. Requests used this month: {used}/2.
promotion.noRequests: You haven't submitted a request yet. You may apply up to twice per month.
promotion.placeholder: Tell us about yourself and link your best toons...
promotion.errorEmpty: Please write something about yourself before submitting.
promotion.errorLimit: You have already submitted 2 promotion requests this month.
promotion.errorPending: You already have a pending promotion request being reviewed.
promotion.successMsg: Promotion request submitted! Moderators will review it within 24 hours.

nickColor.title: Nick color
nickColor.cooldownNote: Color of the nickname can be changed only one time in 24 hours.
nickColor.notAllowed: Only cowboys can change color of their nicknames.

usernameIcon.title: Username icon
usernameIcon.patreonNote: As a Patreon supporter you can set a small icon that appears next to your username everywhere on the site. Recommended: 32 × 32 px PNG / GIF / WebP. Max 128 KB.
usernameIcon.notPatreon: This feature is for Patreon supporters.

spoodersPatreon.title: Spooders & Patreon
spoodersPatreon.note: Connect your Patreon account to automatically receive spooders based on your pledge tier. Your current balance: {count} spooders.
